_readme.description: Scrapes Domain suburb profiles via fetch() in a Code node, writes to Google Sheet, sends Telegram confirmation.
_readme.architecture: Schedule → Code (fetch scrape) → Split → Google Sheets update → Telegram
_readme.note: The Code node uses native fetch() — no Playwright required. Runs entirely inside n8n.
setup: 1. Google Sheets credential: n8n Credentials → Google Sheets OAuth2
Set GOOGLE_SHEET_ID variable to your sheet ID (from the URL)
Sheet must have a 'suburb_data' tab with columns: suburb, median_price, dom, clearance_rate, rental_yield
Create a bot via @BotFather, get the token
Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID variable to your chat ID
4. Import: n8n → Workflows → Import from file → select this file
5. Connect credentials to the Google Sheets and Telegram nodes
